title: Understanding Anxiety
summary: What anxiety is, why it happens, and what helps.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.markdown: Anxiety is a normal human response. It becomes a problem when it is intense, persistent, and interferes with daily life.

sections.heading: Common signs
sections.markdown:
- racing thoughts
- tight chest
- restlessness
- trouble sleeping

sections.heading: What helps
sections.markdown: Try **box breathing (4-4-4-4)**, progressive muscle relaxation, short walks, and cognitive reframing.

sections.heading: Try this (2 min)
sections.markdown: Do the *5–4–3–2–1* grounding: name 5 things you see, 4 you feel, 3 you hear, 2 you smell, 1 you taste.
